title: caucalis maritima
intro: Caucalis maritima, also known as sea hollow or sea cockle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Caucalis maritima can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
